_meta.provenance: The Mount Pleasant Heights to Rezende corridor (route HEIGHTS-REZENDE, its 15 stops and its geometry) is derived from Mhofu's own kombi rides recorded on 2026-07-07 with the Svika field GPS logger: one clean run per direction. Stop names are exactly as the rider marked them in the field; nothing on this corridor is invented. The three CBD routes (MARKETSQ-AVONDALE, FOURTHST-BORROWDALE, WESTGATE-COPA), their stops and the two rank to rank walking transfers are carried over from the v2 seed (Mhofu's Google Maps and Waze verification) so the planner stays a connected network for multi leg trips. The corridor connects to the CBD only at the real Rezende rank.

corridor.name: Mount Pleasant Heights to Rezende
corridor.geometry: packages/db/seed/geo/corridor.route.geojson (base line), corridor.stops.geojson, corridor.variance.geojson; derived by packages/db/seed/geo/derive.mjs
corridor.base_line: Clean return run (Rezende to Heights), 23 smoothed vertices, about 13.5 km, about 27 minutes riding.
corridor.variance_note: The inbound run (Heights to Rezende) took customer seeking detours, about 15.5 km and 43 minutes. It is kept only as variance data for later ETA work and does not shape the base route.
corridor.caveat: This is a single real ride per direction. It is real, not synthetic. More runs will refine the geometry, the stop set and the timings.

_meta.fares: Corridor fare is a flat $1.50 (USD) for the whole HEIGHTS-REZENDE route, dated to the 2026-07-07 ride, and sits inside the verified 2026 band ($1.00 to $2.00 after the March 2026 fuel hikes; COMBINED-EVIDENCE-BASE.md item 1). The corridor fare is flat so it carries no per pair tiers: every stop pair on the route is charged the one end to end fare. The three CBD routes keep their v2 placeholder tiers (dated 2026-03-07) pending corridor fieldwork.
_meta.fare_fallback_rule: A stop pair with no verified segment tier is charged the route's end to end fare (never undercharge, never invent a tier).
_meta.direction_rule: outbound = the listed stop order (named start toward named end); inbound = the reverse. For HEIGHTS-REZENDE, outbound is Heights (2nd boom gate) toward Rezende rank.

sp_pe_cork.name: Prince Edward St at Cork Rd Junction

sp_lomagundi_kinggeorge_pickup.name: King George Rd just off Lomagundi Rd

routes.name: Mt Pleasant Heights to Rezende Rank
Market Square Rank to Avondale Shops
Fourth Street Rank to Sam Levy's Village

transfers.notes: Walk east across the CBD from Rezende to Fourth Street Rank.
Heavy foot traffic walk west across the CBD between two major ranks.
